buildCommand: export PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PWD:$PATH && (command -v rustup >/dev/null || curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal) && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -LsSf https://github.com/trunk-rs/trunk/releases/download/v0.21.14/trunk-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar -xz && bun run build
